title: Vis-à-vis
summary:
Vis-à-vis may refer to:Vis-à-vis, a French expression in English, literally "face to face (with)", meaning in comparison with or in relation to
Vis-à-vis (album), by Karol Mikloš, 2002
Vis-à-vis (carriage), a type of horse-drawn carriage
Vis a vis , a Spanish TV series
"Vis à Vis" , an episode of the TV series
